zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Tysen Swaim於1659年9月16日出生在荷蘭-拉藍德利爾達姆時，他的父親Matthys Barentsen Swaim38歲，母親Magdelena Syctie Cornelise23歲。他於大約1680年與Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1661年移民到尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他去世於1720年3月10日在美國紐約州里士滿里士滿享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthony Tysen Swaim于1659年9月16日出生在荷兰-拉藍德利爾達姆时，他的父亲Matthys Barentsen Swaim38岁，母亲Magdelena Syctie Cornelise23岁。他于大约1680年与Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene在美国纽约州里士滿里士滿结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1661年移民到尼福 內德藍德劍橋大學默里 阿姆斯特爾達姆。他去世于1720年3月10日在美国纽约州里士滿里士滿享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swaim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Dutch   Sweem  . Compare   Swim   and   Swims  .

History: The surname Swaim was adopted in the late 17th century by the Dutch Barentse (or, according to other sources, Van Pelt) family in Staten Island, NY. The family legend says that it is an acronym for Sworn to Withhold Allegiance from Invading Monarchy, the slogan of a Dutch resistance group in New Netherlands.

variants.name: Sweem
meanings: Dutch: nickname from Middle Dutch sweem, the name of a waterbird, or a topographic name from Middle Dutch sweme ‘wet land, pond’. Alternatively, perhaps Dutch form of the related German surname Schwemm (see Schwemmer ). The surname Sweem is not found in the Netherlands. Compare Swaim , Swim , and Swims .

variants.name: Swims
meanings: Altered form of Swaim or Swim , surnames of Dutch and English (ultimately perhaps German) origin, with the addition of excrescent -s.

variants.name: Swim
meanings: Altered form of   Swaim  , a surname of Dutch origin.
English: Anglicized form of an unidentified, perhaps German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

nameMeanings.name: Tysen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, which is of dual origin. In part it is a metronymic from the medieval woman's given name Dye, a pet form of Dionysia , and in part it is a nickname for a hot-tempered person, from Old French tison ‘firebrand’. As a given name it is often taken as an expanded form of or patronymic from Ty .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1683: Richmond, New York Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Richmond, New York, United States 1898: Borough of Richmond, New York, United States 1975: Borough of Staten Island, New York United States
An English and Dutch fleet beat France in the Battle at La Hogue.
The Treaty of Ryswick was signed in Holland. It ended the War of the Grand Alliance (War of the League of Augsburg,1688-1697) between France and the Grand Alliance.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Tysen Swaim was born on 16 September 1659, in Leerdam, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Matthys Barentsen Swaim, was 38 and his mother, Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, was 23. He married Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene about 1680, in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He immigrated to New Amsterdam, New Netherland in 1661. He died on 10 March 1720, in Richmond, Richmond, New York, United States, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Tysen Swaim est né le 16 septembre 1659, à Leerdam, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Matthys Barentsen Swaim, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene environ 1680, à Richmond, Richmond, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il a immigré au New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1661. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1720, à Richmond, Richmond, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Tysen Swaim am 16. September 1659 in Leerdam, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthys Barentsen Swaim 38 und seine Mutter Magdelena Syctie Cornelise 23. Er hat um 1680 in Richmond, Richmond, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er ist 1661 nach New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland eingewandert. Er starb am 10. März 1720 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Richmond, Richmond, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Tysen Swaim è nato il il 16 settembre 1659 nel Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Matthys Barentsen Swaim, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene circa 1680, nel Richmond, Richmond, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Immigrato nel New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland nel 1661. Morì il 10 marzo 1720, nel Richmond, Richmond, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Tysen Swaimが1659年9月16日にオランダズイド-hオランドリールダムで生まれた時，父Matthys Barentsen Swaimは38歳，母Magdelena Syctie Corneliseは23歳であった。約1680年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドでNeeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuCheneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年にニーウウ ネダーランドニュー アムステルダムに移住した。彼は1720年3月10日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州リチモンドリチモンドで60歳で死去した。

ko.Richmond, New York, British Colonial Ame: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 리ch몽

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Tysen Swaim(이)가 1659년 9월 16일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 리르다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthys Barentsen Swaim(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Magdelena Syctie Cornelise(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1680년 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에서 Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년에 니우w 네델랜드 뉴 아스터다로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1720년 3월 10일 미국 뉴욕 주 리ch몽 리ch몽에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Tysen Swaim nasceu em 16 de setembro de 1659, em Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Matthys Barentsen Swaim, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene aproximadamente 1680, em Richmond, Richmond, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele imigrou para o New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland em 1661. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1720, em Richmond, Richmond, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Tysen Swaim родился 16 сентября 1659 г. в местности лирдам, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Matthys Barentsen Swaim было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene около 1680 г. в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в ню амстирдам, ниеув недирланд в 1661 году. Он умер 10 марта 1720 г. в местности ричмонд, ричмонд, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anthony Tysen Swaim nació el 16 de septiembre de 1659, en Leerdam, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Matthys Barentsen Swaim, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Magdelena Syctie Cornelise, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Neeltje Ariansdatter Jansz DuChene aproximadamente 1680, en Richmond, Richmond, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Inmigró a New Amsterdam, Nieuw Nederland en 1661. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1720, en Richmond, Richmond, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 60 años.
